name: 15-minute Creamy Fettuccini Alfredo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, stir together the cream cheese, Parmesan, butter, and heavy cream.
2. Heat, stirring until smooth.
3. Add hot, cooked fettuccine and toss until well covered with the sauce.
4. Serve immediately, sprinkled with nutmeg.
